offer: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients, inaccurate tracking of fixed assets causes tax reporting delays. We provide a fixed asset depreciation service instead of manual spreadsheets and outdated accounting software.
problem: Inaccurate tracking of fixed assets and depreciation calculations.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting advice
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for asset tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the service
Offer early access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
